'''Midnight Squadron''' was a [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|SpecForce]] unit of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It was part of the [[Eclipse Team]]. [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Derembus Sitnalta]] was the [[Heavy Weapons Specialists|heavy weapons crewer]] of Midnight Squadron while [[Lieutenant Colonel/Legends|Lieutenant Colonel]] [[Palpatine Essex Yerac]] served as Midnight Leader.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
